notable_phrases: better than we expected despite supply constraints, strong foreign exchange headwinds
no obvious evidence of macroeconomic impact during the June quarter
we do believe that we saw macroeconomic headwinds that impacted our business
summary: Apple reported better-than-expected Q3 results with record revenue despite FX headwinds and supply constraints, though management acknowledged selective macro impacts in wearables and digital advertising while expressing confidence in iPhone strength and services growth.
change_summary: vs 2022 Q2: Forward guidance sentiment increased by 13.00.
